spec_match.rationale: The comparison renders none, auto, and all as real text-decoration-skip-ink values, feature-detects the all keyword, and shows the live longhand declarations being applied.

interactive.rationale: Script buttons plus controls for font size, underline color, offset, thickness, and underline position update all three comparison columns and the live CSS readout.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature-index blurb now matches the controls on the page and the side-by-side comparison delivered by the concept.

edge_cases.rationale: A visible CSS.supports panel distinguishes supported browsers from unsupported ones and explains the fallback rendering for the all column.

references.rationale: The references section includes the required chromestatus.com/feature/5077600085082112 link and the CSS Text Decoration Level 4 spec.

design_system.rationale: The raw hex color picker was replaced with CSS-variable color choices, new local styling uses project variables, and button background rules include explicit text colours.

summary: The previous major missing-reference finding and the moderate interactivity/spec/fallback concerns are resolved with a stronger live comparison and support-detection surface.
